subject: docs(architecture): update CLAUDE.md to reflect all extracted files and TS migrations
body:
Architecture section was stale after refactoring session. Updated:

- Added 7 new component files: SampleImagesSection, AIPromptHelper,
  FreeformEditor, TextStyleControls, ReaderMode, MobileLayout, DesktopLayout
- Added 3 new util files: exportHelpers.js, canvasRenderers.js, layoutHelpers.ts
- Fixed 3 file extensions: sampleImages.ts, fonts.ts, textDefaults.ts
- Updated App.jsx description (state orchestrator role)
- Updated stylePresets.js description (now includes text styles)
- Updated PlatformPreview.jsx description (now has search filter)
- Added npm test to Common Commands

Tags: docs, architecture, claude-md
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
